subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One, whether in prison or out of prison, hath summoned all to the Most Exalted Horizon, whereunto all things bear witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم در سجن و غیر سجن کل را بافق اعلی دعوت نموده جمیع اشیا شهادت میدهند
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
